_doc: Char-count baselines for each LLM prompt factory. PromptSizeProbeTest reads this file and asserts each factory's prompt stays below its ceiling. When a prompt shrinks by >15% the test logs a warning prompting the developer to update the baseline to lock in the gain. When updating, set 'chars' to the new measured value, 'ceiling' to ~chars * 1.15 (≈15% headroom for additive future tweaks), fill 'updatedBy' with the issue or PR number, and explain the change in 'reason'.

contractPrompt.reason: Trimmed definitional duplication from activity, end-state, branch, and decision-kind sections. PARALLEL recognition phrases restored after PR review (#301) for symmetry with EXCLUSIVE/INCLUSIVE bullets — ~170 chars above the immediate post-trim low (#297).

generationPrompt.reason: Initial baseline after conservatively collapsing activity-kind and end-state-kind mapping tables (#297). The branch-kind mapping table and worked examples are load-bearing and stayed intact.

alignmentPrompt.reason: Initial baseline. Not trimmed in #297 because AlignmentClassification enum carries no @JsonClassDescription per-value, so the prompt's classification definitions are load-bearing.

readinessPrompt.reason: Initial baseline. Not trimmed in #297 because ReadinessDimension and MissingProcessArea enums carry no @JsonClassDescription per-value, so per-dimension guidance in the prompt is load-bearing.
